originalAlarm.description: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

sanitizedDescription: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value
presenceCondition:
(or (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         (not __need___FILE)
         __STRICT_ANSI__
         __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         (not __need___FILE)
         (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
         __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         (not __need___FILE)
         (not __USE_EXTERN_INLINES)
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         __need___FILE
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY))
model:
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __need___FILE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun APU_HAS_LDAP () Bool
  true)
